nodes.name: Apparate
nodes.effect: A non-verbal transportation spell that allows a witch or wizard to instantly travel on the spot and appear at another location (disapparate is the opposite)

nodes.name: Avada Kedavra
nodes.effect: Also known as The Killing Curse, the most evil spell in the Wizarding World; one of three Unforgivable Curses; Harry Potter is the only known witch or wizard to survive it

nodes.name: Crucio
nodes.effect: One of three Unforgivable Curses, it causes unbearable pain in the target

nodes.name: Disapparate
nodes.effect: A non-verbal transportation spell that allows a witch or wizard to instantly travel on the spot and leave for another location (apparate is the opposite)

nodes.name: Expecto patronum
nodes.effect: The Patronus Charm is a powerful projection of hope and happiness that drives away Dementors; a corpeal Patronus takes the the respective animal form of the caster, while a non-corpeal appears as a wisp of light; at 13, Harry Potter was the youngest known witch or wizard to prouduce a corpeal Patronus

nodes.name: Expelliarmus
nodes.effect: Forces an opponent to drop whatever's in their possession

nodes.name: Impedimenta
nodes.effect: A temporary jinx that slows the movement of the target

nodes.name: Riddikulus
nodes.effect: Used to defeat a Boggart, the charm allows the scary creature to assume a comedic form, disarming it

nodes.name: Sonorus
nodes.effect: Amplifies the witch or wizard's voice

nodes.name: Stupefy
nodes.effect: The Stunning spell freezes objects and renders living targets unconscious
